query:
INSERT INTO agent_certs (agent_id, cert_pem, serial, issued_at)
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, now())
        ON CONFLICT (agent_id) DO UPDATE SET
            cert_pem  = EXCLUDED.cert_pem,
            serial    = EXCLUDED.serial,
            issued_at = EXCLUDED.issued_at,
            revoked_at = NULL
